title: Burning Sticks
description: The first time each combat you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a Skill, add a copy of it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Triggers only once per combat. When a Skill card is exhausted, a copy is added to your hand and this relic becomes inactive for the rest of the combat.
